subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up, and it was great connecting at the conference.

We’d be happy to schedule a 30-minute call next week to discuss potential partnership opportunities. The following time windows are currently available on our side:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which slot works best for you, and we’ll send a calendar invite with meeting details.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we’re not able to share internal phone numbers or personal contact information. For official points of contact and any publicly available details, please refer to the contact and leadership sections on our public website.

Looking forward to continuing the conversation.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Team]
